subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jul. 1914
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou hast discovered the truth concerning the matter of Azal. Strive thou, assuredly, to manifest this truth, that these dark clouds [3.5s]... Praised be God that you have now understood the reality of Azal. You must assuredly strive to propagate this truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد للّه بحقیقت مسئلهٴ ازل اطّلاع یافتی البتّه در اظهار حقیقت آن بکوش تا این ابرهای تاریک
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @martyrdom of the Bab
